_meta.description: Route map for scripts/hermes/telegram-command-router.py — maps Telegram slash commands to backing A-Wiki scripts. Each key is a command name (the skill dir name = the Telegram /<cmd>). 'kind' is 'search' (FTS5 query) or 'orchestrate' (persona fan-out). 'phase' is the lifecycle phase for orchestrate commands. Source of truth for chunk(hermes-e); see docs/architecture/hermes-cross-agent-handoff.md.
